data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the verification timeline.
data.assessment: The requirement for a verification timeline (pending/verified/rejected/revoked) was not directly addressed in the prior step evidence. There are no specific checks or API reads provided that confirm the existence or handling of this verification timeline. As a result, the validation cannot be completed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the verification timeline (pending/verified/rejected/revoked).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for verification timeline
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the verification timeline.
